example-vip.title: Cappy Door Break
example-vip.author: Retired64
example-vip.description: you need OMM Rebirth. Break through doors in a fun way using Cappy!

b3313.title: B3313
b3313.author: TikalSM64 & Blocky.cmd
b3313.description: Some extra bug fixes, general compatibility tweaks, etc. Fixes voice desync issues, Crescent Castle death door, updated star tracker texture and layout, new custom palettes, and various small tweaks.

mitm.title: MITM
mitm.author: ManIsCat2
mitm.description: Pizza tower work (Warps need to be fixed) idrk how warps in MITM work some scripts errors

last-impact.title: Last Impact Coop
last-impact.author: ManIsCat2
last-impact.description: 2 new bossfights (spider and virus), music added to hub 2, flood detection, collision fixes for hub 1, proper OMM compatibility, course 11 music fix, code gate in course 10, and various other bug fixes.

peachfury.title: Peach's Fury
peachfury.author: ManIsCat2
peachfury.description: Added cloud powerup, camera custom SFX, all 8-bit level music, audio fade in/out, star name display on collection, all stars now completable, fixed star saving and collection sound. Peach says subscribe to Kaze after 25 stars.

sm64land.title: Cat's SM64 Land
sm64land.author: ManIsCat2
sm64land.description: Port is 94% completed. Final Bowser fight not available — objective is to collect any available stars. Contributions are open.
